creator: man@kurier.spb.ru
text:
trafd 3.0.2.1 doesn't collect traffic.
traflog show only old statistics of traffic.
Example:
(ext0) gw1.kurier.spb.ru at May  4 15:02:20 - May  5 07:41:01
 Summary: 1034470747 data bytes, 1091313737 all bytes, 1673 records
     From           Port         To            Port  Proto     Data       All

But now it's May 12.

Version 3.0.1_2 working well.
